zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton於大約1098年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾達文崔時，他的父親Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton54歲，母親Matilda of Huntingdon25歲。他和Isabelle de Beaumont至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他於1141年登記服兵役。他去世於1153年8月在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton于大约1098年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾達文崔时，他的父亲Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton54岁，母亲Matilda of Huntingdon25岁。他和Isabelle de Beaumont至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他于1141年登记服兵役。他去世于1153年8月在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton was born about 1098, in Daventry, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton, was 54 and his mother, Matilda of Huntingdon, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Isabelle de Beaumont. He registered for military service in 1141. He died in August 1153, in Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton est né environ 1098, à Daventry, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Matilda of Huntingdon, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Isabelle de Beaumont. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1141. Il est décédé en août 1153, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton um 1098 in Daventry, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton 54 und seine Mutter Matilda of Huntingdon 25. Er hatte mit Isabelle de Beaumont mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1141 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb im August 1153 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton è nato il circa 1098 nel Daventry, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Matilda of Huntingdon, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Isabelle de Beaumont. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1141. Morì nel agosto 1153, nel Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northamptonが約1098年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアダベントリーで生まれた時，父Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northamptonは54歳，母Matilda of Huntingdonは25歳であった。彼はIsabelle de Beaumontとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1141年に兵役登録をした。彼は1153年8月にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton(이)가 대략 1098년 영국 노르섬프토실르 대븐트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda of Huntingdon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Isabelle de Beaumont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1141년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1153년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton nasceu aproximadamente 1098, em Daventry, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Matilda of Huntingdon, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Isabelle de Beaumont. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1141. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1153, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton родился около 1098 г. в местности давентри, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda of Huntingdon, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Isabelle de Beaumont. В 1141 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер август 1153 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1140 to 1153: mai le 1140 e o'o I le 1153

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton nació aproximadamente 1098, en Daventry, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Matilda of Huntingdon, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Isabelle de Beaumont. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1141. Murió en agosto de 1153, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
